name: Crockpot Beans Barley
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the white and pinto beans overnight.
2. Sauté onion, mushrooms, and carrot in 1 tablespoon of vegetable broth until tender.
3. Add drained beans, vegetable bouillon, mustard, and parsley to a pot. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes.
5. Add split peas, lentils, and barley. Cover and simmer another hour until all beans are tender.
(Note: For added spice, include lots of tabasco and pepper.)
6. Note that this recipe is typically associated with colder months, but it can also be enjoyed cold. Due to the cooking method, some texture may become mushy, so consider sautéing on the stove for a firmer result if desired.
